feedback.text: I have been playing games for 30 years and I'd like my games to work even if they didn't provide a financial success for the company and they kill it after a few years. the solution in my opinion isn't that hard for game companies. lets take a game like Apex legends, when it's eventually will be killed I'd like them to just have a disclaimer "we don't support this game anymore, you can setup a dedicated server and connect manually" That puts the responsibility on you the user or a community effort to host a server. on the developer to include a connect button and a dedicated server. That's it, I have a way to keep it alive and the developers doesn't need to put much effort into it.
